query:
-- Fix 1: Amy's session has stage=BOOKED but isBooked=0 — flip the flag
UPDATE conversation_sessions SET isBooked = 1 WHERE id = 690009 AND stage = 'BOOKED';

-- Fix 2: Rohan's message has ts=1742270456000 (March 18, 2025 — 1 year ago)
-- Correct it to the session's actual updatedAt timestamp (2026-03-18 04:18:52 = 1742271532000)
UPDATE conversation_sessions 
SET messageHistory = REPLACE(messageHistory, '"ts":1742270456000', '"ts":1742271532000')
WHERE id = 750002;
command:

UPDATE conversation_sessions SET isBooked = 1 WHERE id = 690009 AND stage = 'BOOKED';

-- Fix 2: Rohan's message has ts=1742270456000 (March 18, 2025 — 1 year ago)
-- Correct it to the session's actual updatedAt timestamp (2026-03-18 04:18:52 = 1742271532000)
UPDATE conversation_sessions 
SET messageHistory = REPLACE(messageHistory, '"ts":1742270456000', '"ts":1742271532000')
WHERE id = 750002;
